work_unit: gitignore: add clawhub-installed skill stub dirs
situation: Scout scan found skills project with dirty=2 (two untracked directories: oneday-capability-register/ and oneday-open-cli/). Both contain only .clawhub/origin.json marker files — ClawHub registry install metadata stubs with no actual skill source code. Top 3 scout recommendations were all blocked (awaiting merge). skills was the best actionable target.
action: Added 'oneday-capability-register/' and 'oneday-open-cli/' to skills/.gitignore under a new '# ClawHub-installed skill stubs' section. Committed to worktree opt-chore-1782680083 (commit 55c101c).
outcome_evidence: git show HEAD --stat in worktree shows '.gitignore | 4 ++++', commit 55c101c. grep confirms ClawHub entries present in file. Once merged to skills main, 'git status --short' in skills repo will no longer show ?? for those two directories.
next_suggestion: 1) Human approve merge of opt-chore-1782680083 (skills .gitignore, 4 lines, low risk); 2) Human approve merge of existing blocked worktrees: opt-docs-1782638147/opt-agent-dashboard-1782638553/opt-docs-1782638790; 3) stagehand-analysis has TODO=9 but all are upstream/integration test TODOs — consider reviewing if any are actionable
